faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in College Point?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination in College Point typically ranges from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in College Point?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to College Point residents. Our team understands that mouse infestations require urgent attention, and we prioritize rapid response times throughout Queens to prevent the problem from worsening.

faqs.question: What does your mouse extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap and bait placement, exclusion work to seal access points, sanitation recommendations, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination. We also provide prevention tips to keep mice from returning.

faqs.question: Are your mouse extermination methods safe for families and pets in College Point?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We take extra precautions in homes with children and animals, and we clearly explain all safety measures during treatment.
